study_title: Transcriptional responses in honey bee larvae infected with chalkbrood fungus
exp_title: RNA-Seq of Apis mellifera: hemolymph in control group  of C/C genotype 2
design: the mRNAs were enriched using the oligo(dT) magnetic beads, fragmented into short pieces (about 300 nt) by NEBNext UltraTM RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina (NEB, USA), and then cDNAs were synthesized by random hexamer primer and M-MuLV Reverse Transcriptase(RNase H-). Finally, sequencing adaptors were ligated to the cDNA fragments by PCR amplication.
sample_description: the hemolymph of C/C larvae from control group
